title: Two voices, one role
author: FoxLover397
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
tags: Other Additional Tags to Be Added
summary:
What happens to someone who finds themselves in a new world…with an unexpected plus one?
That is what happened to Isabella “Izzy” Mattias and Niko “Nyx” Yuukiyama. They ran into each other when they were going home. Most people wouldn’t expect those two to be walking together, but that day, things changed. The last thing they can remember is a horse-drawn carriage. Now, they both find themselves in the world of Twisted Wonderland, at Night Raven College.
The two must put their differences aside to navigate this new place. Will they be able to go home? Or will their clashing ideals cause them to never return?

title: Hunger and Consumption: A Guide on How to Eat the Ones You Love
author: arivergrowsintheeast
tags: AU where they're not exactly monsters but not exactly human either
Cannibalism as a Metaphor for Love
summary:
“Have you ever eaten a person before?”
“...What?”
He turned to look at the young man sitting next to him who was facing forward, watching the sun slowly climb down from the sky. Without bothering to look over, he continued to speak.
“I heard it was delicious. Especially if it’s someone you love, they say you can taste it. The love they have for you. The flavor differs though but…”
Or; two young men pretend to follow a short guide on how to eat the person they love

title: no matter what
author: outofocus
summary:
Idia remembers the day his words appeared as if it were yesterday. He had just turned eight. Back then, he was still capable of looking forward to things, soulmates included. He and Ortho used to talk about it all the time. What their words might be. How it would feel when they heard them for the first time. Lonely kids cling to dreams like that, and Idia had clung harder than anyone.
That morning he woke up, rolled onto his side, and looked at his wrist. His breath caught in his throat. The letters stood out as if they’d been burned into his skin, sharp and impossible to misread:
You are the most irritating person I’ve had the misfortune of meeting.

author: Sigmas_cvmfilleddump
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
relationships: Epel Felmier & Jack Howl & Ortho Shroud & Deuce Spade & Ace Trappola & Yuu | Player & Sebek Zigvolt
Kalim Al-Asim & Azul Ashengrotto & Ruggie Bucchi & Floyd Leech & Jade Leech & Riddle Rosehearts & Silver & Jamil Viper
Trey Clover & Cater Diamond & Malleus Draconia & Rook Hunt & Leona Kingscholar & Vil Schoenheit & Idia Shroud & Lilia Vanrouge
tags: I Wrote This Instead of Sleeping
summary:
Aculeo Samael is a Mauve Stinger Jellyfish, an Octavinelle student and childhood friends with Azul and the tweels. He often goes with the flow, or wherever the sea's currents are. That habit stuck with him even on land, going where the wind takes him. Why is that relevant?
Because of how many times he witnessed couples all around Night Raven College, getting all intimate, which he knows he probably shouldn't be seeing.
He is tired. Set him free.
Or
My OC, Aculeo Samael, also called Ule, trying to do his usual thing but he keeps seeing couples. He shouldn't be surprised anymore.
He's a second year, btw... He's 17. Rated Teen up and above because they might get a little freaky... Or just a lot of cussing. Might be OOC.

title: Where Roses Wither
author: Shatteredgl4ss
warnings: Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
summary:
Julia Clover leaves.
She doesn’t attend the trial.She doesn’t say goodbye properly.She doesn’t look back.
Instead, she boards a carriage bound for Maquillaville — the glittering capital of the Shaftlands — where reputation is currency, beauty is power, and weakness is devoured whole.
Accepted into one of the most prestigious all-girls academies in the city — with quiet help from Vil Schoenheit himself — Julia is thrown into a world of couture uniforms, ruthless social hierarchies, and girls raised to rule empires rather than hearts.
At first, she tells herself this is temporary.
A distraction.
A way to escape the courtroom, the whispers, and the memory of a boy who still lingers in every rose garden.
But Maquillaville changes her.
As the trial unfolds far away and Riddle Rosehearts faces truths he cannot outrun, Julia builds something new — a version of herself that doesn’t break under pressure.
But reinvention has a cost.
Because no matter how far she runs, roses still grow in memory.

summary:
With the craziness of Heartslabyul and Riddle's overbearing temper finally settled, Lizzie and Addie can somewhat say they've adapted to this strange, new world. They attend classes and get to know their new friends all while trying to find out to get back home.
The Inter-Rose Queendom Spelldrive Tournament is approaching. When players as well bystanders alike are getting hurt under mysterious and downright suspicious circumstances, they are intrigued and concerned. However, it isn't until Trey is injured and Riddle pulls them to investigate with him and a few others that they're pulled once again right into the middle of things. title: Anomaly | Twisted Wonderland
author: sethcertified
summary:
The mirror didn’t choose you. No magic. No place in Night Raven College.
You are an anomaly in a world built on magic, rules, and hierarchy—and that alone is enough to make you impossible to ignore.
At first, it is curiosity. A magicless outsider who doesn’t behave correctly, who disrupts expectations simply by existing in the wrong spaces. But attention in Night Raven College never stays simple for long.
Soon, you are being watched. Studied. Pulled into the orbit of people who should have never been interested in you at all. Across the school, others begin to notice you too—drawn in by your unpredictability, your defiance, your refusal to fit into any system they understand. What starts as observation turns into fixation, and fixation turns into something far more dangerous: attachment.
They shouldn’t care about you.They shouldn’t think about you.They shouldn’t want you.
But they do.
And the more you disrupt their world, the more they begin to revolve around you—each one of them convinced, in their own way, that you are something meant to be understood… and kept.

title: Search Through Wonderland
author: Nobody123_yay
summary:
Once there lived a Prince named Riddle Rosehearts. He was beloved by all within the Kingdom Of Roses. There he lived "happily" with his beloved group of servants. Yet on the day of his coronation, he disappeared. Some blamed the incident that reach so far back into his childhood while others blamed his parent's pressure upon him. One thing was for sure though, his disappearance shocked the kingdom. Leading to his group of beloved servants abandoning all that they knew in a search across wonderland to find him. Throughout their journey, they meet a bunch of different and unique people with many different issues and problems. Eventually leading them to finding their Prince who was different than what they knew...
><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><
Basically a story about the Heartslabyul cast and their adventures across the world to find Riddle! With fun a bunch of fun and depressing moments, leading to a happy ending.
Updating every Wednesday and Saturday!
